payload.label: fan
payload.short_description: dark wood-blade ceiling fan with light
payload.long_description: Downward-view ceiling fan with five dark wood-finish blades and a central frosted glass dome light in a metal housing, mounted to a pale ceiling; blades are slightly edge-cropped in the image — the fan appears to be about 3.0 meters from the camera.
